description: Anti-fascist, anti-racist, and anti-drug hardcore crew founded in the late 1980s by Elgin James in Boston, Massachusetts. Originally fought Neo-Nazis and racist groups in the punk scene, but later accused of unprovoked violence and intimidation. Classified by the FBI as a street gang.

country_links.evidence_quote: By the early 2000s, there were FSU chapters in Portland (Maine), Philadelphia, Chicago, Arizona, Los Angeles, Seattle, upstate New York , and New Jersey.
country_links.context: FSU has chapters and carries out violent activities in multiple U.S. cities.
